name: Peach Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and cinnamon; stir in peaches and toss well to coat.
3. Pour mixture into pie crust.
4. For topping, in a small bowl, combine brown sugar, flour, and rolled oats. Cut in butter until crumbly.
5. Sprinkle topping over pie.
6. Bake on preheated baking sheet for 40 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm or cold.
